name: SeldonFrame
description: Build, deploy, and sell AI agents for local-service businesses from your IDE. build_workspace creates a live site + booking + CRM + AI receptionist in about 3 minutes; deploy, test, and sell agents through the same server.

authentication.instructions: Send `Authorization: Bearer wst_...` (a SeldonFrame workspace key). Create a free workspace at https://seldonframe.com/build - no signup required.

tools.name: discover
tools.description: Search the SeldonFrame catalog of agents and tools with a natural-language query. Returns entries with id, type, name, description, and price. A blank query lists the catalog.

query.description: Free-text search (e.g. 'send an email', 'book an appointment'). Optional.

tools.name: inspect
tools.description: Get one catalog entry's full input schema and price before running it.

type.description: The entry's type, from discover's result.

id.description: The entry's id (agent slug or tool action slug).

tools.name: run
tools.description: Execute a catalog entry (agent or tool) with its input arguments.

id.description: The entry's id (agent slug or tool action slug).

input.description: Arguments matching the entry's input schema from inspect.

tools_summary: discover / inspect / run - the full SeldonFrame build surface over one bridge
create_full_workspace (via run) - website + booking + intake + CRM + AI chatbot from business facts
deploy_agent (via run) - take a built agent live (phone/chat) with readiness checks
browse/sell (via run) - marketplace listing and earnings surfaces
